title: The Sword Set Down
objective: Refuse the prophecy. Put the sword down. End what the betrayer started.

dialogue.speaker: JIN
dialogue.text: The sword burns in my hand. The prophecy is in my blood. I see the wraiths of every wielder Remembrance has claimed. I see the dark Jin. I see myself — if I do not choose.

dialogue.speaker: MERCHANT
dialogue.text: Jin. You do not have to do this alone. We came up the tower with you. The bandit king. The general's last soldier. We are here.

dialogue.speaker: REMEMBRANCE
dialogue.text: I have made kings. I have broken empires. I have outlived the world. You will not put me down, Jin. You are mine.

dialogue.speaker: JIN
dialogue.text: I am Jin. I am no one's sword. I am the swordsman — and I set you down.

dialogue.speaker: JIN
dialogue.text: The sword is on the ground. The prophecy is broken. The world remains. The empire endures. The alliance stands.
